data.body: 21dd AC2/AC5/AC8 fixes ADDED (uncommitted, worktree): +test_missed_ensure_sweep_does_not_block_writes (AC2), +test_rollback_pre_v1_binary_ignores_record (AC5), +deployment-order rationale para in docs/migrations.md (AC8). Full oracle now 21/21 green, lint clean. Correcting advisory disposition #6 (rollback IS now tested per AC hard req). Plan: after 36c7 subagent finishes+validated, stage-amend ONLY the 21dd files into change 703 (keep Change-Id), re-push, wait green, EARLY-LAND 21dd (regression-safe: additive gate, absent=pass-through, doesn't touch 36c7/release files), then close with CI evidence comment (AC9). 36c7 subagent still running.
